subtitle.en: Turn vision, research, and constraints into clear design standards
subtitle.zh: 把愿景、研究和约束转成清晰的设计判断标准

headline.en: Turn insight into design rules before building
headline.zh: 在开工前把洞察转成设计规则

whyOpen.en: Use this after research or canvas work when the next solution needs explicit must, should, could, and won't criteria.
whyOpen.zh: 在调研或画布工作之后使用，把下一版方案的必须、应该、可以和不做写成明确标准。

audience.en: Teams converting discovery, strategy, or constraints into product and business-model decisions.
audience.zh: 适合把探索、战略或约束转成产品和商业模式决策的团队。

firstSteps.en: Trace each must-have back to customer evidence or strategic constraint.
firstSteps.zh: 每条 must-have 都要追溯到客户证据或战略约束。

firstSteps.en: Move uncertain criteria into experiments instead of arguing them in meetings.
firstSteps.zh: 不确定的标准进入实验，而不是在会议里争论。

outcomes.en: A decision-ready criteria set for designing the next model, offer, or experiment.
outcomes.zh: 一组可用于设计下一版模型、产品或实验的判断标准。

practicePrompts.en: Which criterion is stakeholder preference rather than customer evidence?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪条标准其实是利益相关者偏好，而不是客户证据？

business-model-canvas.en: Must-haves should be defensible against the BMC's Value Propositions and Customer Segments.
business-model-canvas.zh: Must-have 必须能用 BMC 的价值主张和客户细分来辩护。

value-proposition-canvas.en: Each must-have should trace to a VPC Pain or Gain. Without that link it's a wishlist item.
value-proposition-canvas.zh: 每条 must-have 都要追溯到 VPC 的某条痛点或收益。否则就是 wishlist。

experiment-canvas.en: When a should-have or won't-have feels uncertain, design an experiment to make the call.
experiment-canvas.zh: Should-have 或 won't-have 拿不准时,设计一个实验来定。
